# hubspot_property_definitions (Data Source)

Reads HubSpot CRM property definitions without reading CRM records.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hubspot_property_definitions" "contacts" {
  object_type = "contacts"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `object_type` (String) Exact CRM object type API identifier.

### Optional

- `archived` (Boolean) Select archived definitions instead of active definitions; defaults to false.
- `data_sensitivity` (String) Sensitivity selector; defaults to non_sensitive.
- `locale` (String) Optional HubSpot locale selector.

### Read-Only

- `definitions` (Map of Object) Definitions keyed by immutable property name; an empty map is valid. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--definitions))

<a id="nestedatt--definitions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `definitions`

Read-Only:

- `archived_at` (String)
- `calculated` (Boolean)
- `calculation_formula` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `created_user_id` (String)
- `currency_property_name` (String)
- `data_sensitivity` (String)
- `date_display_hint` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `display_order` (Number)
- `external_options` (Boolean)
- `field_type` (String)
- `form_field` (Boolean)
- `group_name` (String)
- `has_unique_value` (Boolean)
- `hidden` (Boolean)
- `hubspot_defined` (Boolean)
- `is_archived` (Boolean)
- `label` (String)
- `modification_metadata` (Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--definitions--modification_metadata))
- `name` (String)
- `number_display_hint` (String)
- `options` (Map of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--definitions--options))
- `referenced_object_type` (String)
- `sensitivity_category` (String)
- `show_currency_symbol` (Boolean)
- `text_display_hint` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `updated_user_id` (String)

<a id="nestedobjatt--definitions--modification_metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `definitions.modification_metadata`

Read-Only:

- `read_only_definition` (Boolean)
- `read_only_options` (Boolean)
- `read_only_value` (Boolean)


<a id="nestedobjatt--definitions--options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `definitions.options`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `display_order` (Number)
- `hidden` (Boolean)
- `label` (String)
